nasb.text: Reuben, Israel’s firstborn, the sons of Reuben: of Hanoch, the family of the Hanochites; of Pallu, the family of the Palluites;

esv.text: Reuben, the firstborn of Israel; the sons of Reuben: of Hanoch, the clan of the Hanochites; of Pallu, the clan of the Palluites;

cnv.text: 以色列的長子流本：流本的子孫，屬哈諾的，有哈諾家族；屬法路的，有法路家族；

ccb.text: 以色列的长子是吕便，吕便的子孙有哈诺族、法路族、
